name: @para/csv
description: Streaming RFC 4180 CSV parser + writer. Row-objects iterator (parseCsv / stringify), columnar TypedArray output (parseColumns / parseBatches), single-pass aggregates (reduceColumns). BOM, comments, trim, skipEmptyLines, custom escape. Optional off-main-thread mode via @para/parallel. NOT YET RELEASED — private:true / 0.0.0-dev pending the workspace split.
